params.name: Five-Colored Stone
params.description:
On February 29, 448 BCE, a loud noise was heard from the peak of Flower Fruit Mountain in the Eastern Victory Continent.
At the beginning of heaven and earth, when chaos was yet to be divided, there was a five-colored divine stone. It was embedded at the peak of Flower Fruit Mountain, absorbing the essence of the sun and moon, nurtured by the purity of heaven and earth, and after a long time, it gained spiritual awareness. Within the five-colored stone, a celestial embryo was nurtured, and on …
